case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS SANTOS, TERESITA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $415.56 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, TERESITA SANTOS, ARTURO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
